types1:Item.types1:Name: Agent_Dispatcher_Connector
types1:Item.types1:Description: Service connector for customer support Agent dispatcher

businessConnector.name: Agent_Dispatcher_Connector
businessConnector.description: Service connector for customer support Agent dispatcher

action.label: Dispatcher
action.name: Dispatcher
action.description: Dispatcher: Executes the specific agent at run time

parameter.name: Planner
parameter.testWith:
<Planner xmlns="">
   <app>Query</app>  
   <Attributes>
    <ModelVersion>gemini-2.0-flash-lite</ModelVersion>   
    <EmailSubject>Data Discrepancies After IDMC Sync</EmailSubject>   
    <EmailBody>Hi Informatica Support,

We're running into a major issue with our IDMC setup. After the latest data synchronization, we noticed unexpected discrepancies between the source and target systems. Some records appear missing or incorrect, which is causing confusion and could lead to serious business problems.
We've double-checked our configurations and logs but can't figure out why this is happening.
What we've tried: Verified mappings, checked logs, and reran sync jobs
This is urgent because we rely on accurate data for reporting and decision-making. Please help us get this resolved quickly.

Thanks for your support,
Adam Smith

</EmailBody>   
    <EmailAddress>"Kamuda, Julia" <jkamuda@informatica.com></EmailAddress>   
    <ZendeskTicketLink>https://informatica-21610.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/26</ZendeskTicketLink>   
    <ZendeskTicketNumber>26</ZendeskTicketNumber>   
    <SupportCompanyName>Informatica</SupportCompanyName>   
    <AssigneeEmail>tholub@informatica.com</AssigneeEmail>   
    <OutputDimensionality>768</OutputDimensionality>   
    <PineconeIndexHost>jira-jr7c6kp.svc.aped-4627-b74a.pinecone.io</PineconeIndexHost>   
    <EmbeddedingModel>text-embedding-004</EmbeddedingModel>   
    <JiraProjectKey>TESTAI</JiraProjectKey>   </Attributes>
  </Planner>
